title: Abyrith
description:
Abyrith is a traditional roguelike where a single run can be completed in a short amount of time. Players explore dungeons, combine equipment and skills, and aim to progress by creating unique character builds.

With randomly generated dungeons and a wide variety of elements, each playthrough offers a different experience. It is important to adapt to changing situations by making optimal decisions step by step within a limited set of choices.

Features• 50+ items

• 30+ enemies

• Procedurally generated affixes

• Procedurally generated dungeons

• Class-based system

• Diverse skill system

• Wide range of status effects

• Strategic depth through six elements (Physical, Mental, Fire, Ice, Lightning, Poison)

• Keyboard-only controls
description_short: Abyrith is a traditional turn-based roguelike. Each run lets you build a unique character by combining skills and equipment while exploring and conquering dungeons.
